gate_verification_records.canonical_gate_string: OD-02: Choose a dedicated evidence DB technology and WORM-capable independent archive
gate_verification_records.canonical_requirement: Choose a dedicated evidence DB technology and WORM-capable independent archive
required_evidence_items: Choose a dedicated evidence DB technology and WORM-capable independent archive
observed_evidence_items: P274C selected RECOMMENDED_RESILIENT_LONG_HORIZON with a dedicated evidence store + independent WORM mirror; S3 Object Lock confirms WORM feasibility.
missing_evidence_items: Finalized binding dedicated-evidence-DB technology choice and a provisioned WORM-capable independent archive (no external service exists).
gate_verification_records.pass_criteria_assessment: Design/component/feasibility portion satisfied; production implementation and/or operation evidence absent
gate_verification_records.failure_consequence: STOP / NOT_READY_FOR_G2 until evidence attached; gate must be re-evaluated before any G2 authorization
gate_verification_records.next_minimum_action: In a G2 step, bind the evidence-DB technology and provision/configure the independent WORM archive, then attach configuration evidence.
gate_verification_records.notes: Gate definition is not pass evidence; P274C architecture selection is design, not implementation. Official documentation (if cited) proves mechanism feasibility only, not LotteryNew implementation/operation.

P271J_MODULE.scope: isolated caller-supplied append-only ledger library (tmp/in-memory only)

P271L_PREFLIGHT_TEST.not_run_p274d_reason: preflight references production DB raw stat; not run in P274D

P271L_SCHEMA_TEST.not_run_p274d_reason: opens production DB; FORBIDDEN in P274D, NOT RUN

FRESH_JK.desc: P274D fresh run of committed P271J+P271K temp/in-memory tests, 3 production-DB-hash guard tests deselected

FRESH_PROBE.result: determinism byte-identical, tamper detected, seal-before-outcome fail-closed PASS

RFC8633.section: redundancy: >=4 independent diverse sources; monitoring; security
RFC8633.supports: feasibility of OD-04 >=4 configured time sources + monitoring

RFC3161.section: TST proves a datum existed before a particular time
RFC3161.does_not_support: that LotteryNew operates a TSA / seal barrier

RFC4998.section: archive timestamps, Merkle hash trees, timestamp/hash-tree renewal
RFC4998.supports: feasibility of OD-07/OD-08 long-term evidence + hash-chain renewal
RFC4998.does_not_support: that LotteryNew implements ERS archive records

SQLITE_WAL.section: WAL is part of persistent state; raw-copy of the main DB alone loses committed transactions
SQLITE_WAL.supports: feasibility/necessity of AD-06 gate-46 online-backup-or-quiesced-snapshot (never raw-copy ambiguity)
SQLITE_WAL.does_not_support: that LotteryNew operates a verified online backup

NIST80092.topic: Guide to Computer Security Log Management
NIST80092.supports: feasibility of OD-07 retention + AD-04 audit design
NIST80092.does_not_support: that LotteryNew implements the retention controls

NIST80053.section: AC/AU families; least privilege; separation of duties
NIST80053.supports: feasibility of AD-04 least-privilege/separation-of-duties + OD-08 access

S3_OBJECT_LOCK.section: compliance vs governance retention modes; legal hold
S3_OBJECT_LOCK.supports: feasibility of OD-02/OD-07 WORM-capable independent archive + version-lock
S3_OBJECT_LOCK.does_not_support: that LotteryNew provisioned/operates a WORM archive

SLSA.section: build provenance: builder identity, inputs, build process
SLSA.supports: feasibility of AD-01/AD-05/OD-10 reproducible signed manifests + sealed digests
SLSA.does_not_support: that LotteryNew produces sealed reproducible provenance for a G2 build

committed_evidence_verification.p274a_b_c_digests_recomputed: independently recomputed from each file's documented canonicalization; all three MATCH stored + expected
committed_evidence_verification.historical_vs_fresh: historical P271J 72/72 + P271K 37/37 are COMMITTED_TEST results; P274D fresh run (106 passed, 3 deselected) is the only fresh evidence reported; P271L tests NOT RUN (preflight/inspection touch production DB path)

fresh_rehearsal_records.command: venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_p271j_...py tests/test_p271k_...py -p no:cacheprovider -q --deselect <3 production-DB-hash guard tests> (cwd=worktree, PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1)
fresh_rehearsal_records.environment: venv pytest 9.0.3; worktree at origin/main 77994824; no lottery_api/data/lottery_v2.db present in worktree
fresh_rehearsal_records.temporary_path_policy: tmp_path / :memory: only; bytecode/cache writes suppressed; worktree git status clean after run
fresh_rehearsal_records.limitations: deselected the 3 production-DB-hash guard tests to avoid any production-DB hashing; this is the prototype (P271J/K) mechanism, not the production evidence DB; production form remains unbuilt

fresh_rehearsal_records.committed_code_identity: N/A (ephemeral synthetic probe in /tmp, not committed code)
fresh_rehearsal_records.cases_run: deterministic-manifest hashing, append-only hash-chain tamper detection, seal-before-outcome ordering
fresh_rehearsal_records.result: determinism byte-identical=True; tamper detected=True; seal-before-outcome fail-closed=True
fresh_rehearsal_records.limitations: generic mechanism feasibility only; NOT LotteryNew production implementation

authorization_provides: permission to perform P274D read-only / non-production evidence verification
permission to use committed evidence, official primary documentation, and safe synthetic/temp rehearsal
permission to reconcile the four governance files and open one non-draft PR (left open/unmerged)
owner_commitment_audit.official_source_operational_verification: MANUAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED (not performed; no production/official access in P274D)
owner_commitment_audit.rule: No commitment was invented or inferred. Any gate requiring a missing commitment remains UNVERIFIED_BLOCKED with the appropriate blocker code.

blocker_catalog.NAMED_ASSIGNEE_MISSING: no named individual for a required role
blocker_catalog.OWNER_COMMITMENT_MISSING: required owner commitment not provided by this authorization
blocker_catalog.IMPLEMENTATION_ARTIFACT_MISSING: production implementation artifact does not exist (G2 not authorized)
blocker_catalog.SYNTHETIC_REHEARSAL_NOT_RUN: a named synthetic fixture suite is not committed/run
blocker_catalog.PRODUCTION_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED: gate needs operational production evidence (not available)
blocker_catalog.ACTIVATION_AUTHORIZATION_REQUIRED: depends on a separate activation authorization

summary_counts_notes.committed_evidence_count_basis: counts gates MATERIALLY advanced by committed source/test/contract; the P274C design defines all 52 gates but a gate definition is not pass evidence, so design-only context on a BLOCKED gate is not counted as support

missingness_thresholds.note: missingness fixtures within AD-05 + P274C missingness_policy design

annual_blinded_review.note: OD-12 annual renewal without efficacy peeking

draw_3605_resource_commitment.note: OD-12 signed minimum-resource declaration over 3605-draw horizon

readiness_basis: All 52 gates were examined and classified; 0 VERIFIED, 19 PARTIALLY_VERIFIED, 33 UNVERIFIED_BLOCKED, 0 FAILED, 0 NOT_APPLICABLE. Because >=1 gate remains PARTIAL or BLOCKED, pre-G2 acceptance evidence is incomplete. G1 completion is NOT pre-G2 completion.
G2_authorization_boundary: G2 remains UNAUTHORIZED; a separate owner G2 decision may be considered only after the remaining pre-G2 gates are satisfied with attached, verified evidence.
activation_boundary: activation UNAUTHORIZED; activation_timestamp_utc and first_eligible_target_draw remain UNSET_PENDING_SEPARATE_ACTIVATION_AUTHORIZATION.
production_boundary: production apply NOT_READY_FOR_APPLY; no production DB access performed.

forbidden_actions_confirmed.production_db_metadata_stat: ONE filesystem metadata stat (size+mtime) of the production DB path was performed during a cleanliness check; content-free (no open/query/hash/copy/lock); self-identified minor nonconformance; not repeated
